name: The Entry Hall
description: Cobwebs hang undisturbed beneath a vaulted ceiling perched atop columns of polished stone.
Broken carts and abandoned tools lie where they were abandoned ages ago, yet nothing
has truly fallen into ruin. Crystal lamps still illuminate the space with a steady white light,
casting long shadows across dust-covered mosaics set into the floor.

outcomes.text: Gears grind. Somewhere close, stone slides against stone.
